'''ât-r-m-f''' ('''katarmefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wuv|wuv]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wuv|wuv]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-r-m-f
|-
! Lemma
| katarmefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitarmefoko|thitarmefoko]] || [[word:jitarmefoko|jitarmefoko]] || [[word:shitarmefoko|shitarmefoko]] || [[word:kitarmefoko|kitarmefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutarmefoko|thuthutarmefoko]] || [[word:jujutarmefoko|jujutarmefoko]] || [[word:shushutarmefoko|shushutarmefoko]] || [[word:kukutarmefoko|kukutarmefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutarmefoko|thutarmefoko]] || [[word:jutarmefoko|jutarmefoko]] || [[word:shutarmefoko|shutarmefoko]] || [[word:kutarmefoko|kutarmefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutarmefoko|thutarmefoko]] || [[word:jutarmefoko|jutarmefoko]] || [[word:shutarmefoko|shutarmefoko]] || [[word:kutarmefoko|kutarmefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotarmefoko|thothotarmefoko]] || [[word:jojotarmefoko|jojotarmefoko]] || [[word:shoshotarmefoko|shoshotarmefoko]] || [[word:kokotarmefoko|kokotarmefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotarmefoko|thotarmefoko]] || [[word:jotarmefoko|jotarmefoko]] || [[word:shotarmefoko|shotarmefoko]] || [[word:kotarmefoko|kotarmefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotarmefoko|thotarmefoko]] || [[word:jotarmefoko|jotarmefoko]] || [[word:shotarmefoko|shotarmefoko]] || [[word:kotarmefoko|kotarmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtarmefoko|thĂŠtarmefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtarmefoko|jĂŠtarmefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtarmefoko|shĂŠtarmefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtarmefoko|kĂŠtarmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatarmefoko|thathatarmefoko]] || [[word:jajatarmefoko|jajatarmefoko]] || [[word:shashatarmefoko|shashatarmefoko]] || [[word:kakatarmefoko|kakatarmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatarmefoko|thatarmefoko]] || [[word:jatarmefoko|jatarmefoko]] || [[word:shatarmefoko|shatarmefoko]] || [[word:katarmefoko|katarmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatarmefoko|thatarmefoko]] || [[word:jatarmefoko|jatarmefoko]] || [[word:shatarmefoko|shatarmefoko]] || [[word:katarmefoko|katarmefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
